title: Cogwork Continuum
description: Step into a steampunk-inspired realm where machinery and magic converge. In "Cogwork Continuum", challenge your engineering acumen, craft intricate devices, and navigate a world where gears and steam power the imagination.
body:
![banner](https://cogwork-continuum.com/images/title.png) Step into a world where **gears grind**, **steam hisses**, and **magic pulses beneath the surface**. **Cogwork Continuum** is a carefully curated steampunk-fantasy modpack that merges **mechanical mastery** with **mystical might**, offering a sandbox ripe for engineers, explorers, and enchanters alike. Craft vast contraptions with the **Create mod** and its many powerful add-ons. Unleash arcane potential through systems like **Iron's Spells & Spellbooks** or **Ars Nouveau**. Brave dangerous dungeons, face down epic bosses, and traverse **unique dimensions and places** from the skies of the Aether to the icy abysses of Aquamirae. With enhanced **combat mechanics**, rich **exploration content**, and robust **automation systems**, *Cogwork Continuum* delivers a gameplay experience that’s both cinematic and deeply technical — whether you’re a redstone novice or a steampunk savant.
### **Core Features** - ⚙️ Create-powered Engineering & Automation - ✨ Optional Magic Progression - 🌍 Expanded Worldgen & Unique Dimensions - ⚔️ Overhauled Combat with BetterCombat - 🎮 High Performance + Quality-of-Life Mods - 🧩 Synergistic Mod Selection, Minimal Bloat
Click to expand: Core Mods & Features Breakdown **🛠 Create & Add-ons**
The mechanical heart of Cogwork Continuum. Use rotating shafts, sequenced gearshifts, conveyor belts, and mechanical arms to build: - Complex farms - Logistics systems - Decorative steampunk contraptions Includes several Create extensions (e.g. Encased, Steam 'n' Rails) for expanded utility and visual flair. --- **🔮 Magic Systems**
Whether you're a spell-slinging scholar or prefer a purely mechanical route, you’ll find options here: - **Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks** for structured, tiered spell progression - **Atlas’ Additions** expands ISS with elemental weapons and curios - **Ars Nouveau** (in optional packs) for free-form spell crafting Magic is entirely optional and balanced for tech-first playthroughs. --- **⚔️ Combat & Exploration Enhancements**
- **Better Combat** brings fluid weapon animations and real collision-based attacks - **Cataclysm** adds challenging bosses and Dark Souls-inspired dungeons - **Twilight Forest**, **Blue Skies**, and others add lush new worlds to explore --- **📦 Quality of Life Mods**
- **Carry On** lets you move chests, machines, and even mobs with your hands - **Jade**, **Waystones**, **Controlling**, and more smooth out the experience --- **📸 Immersion & Aesthetics**
- **Exposure** adds analog cameras, film rolls, lightroom development, and photography - **FramedBlocks** allows you to build with any texture - **Supplementaries**, **Decorative Blocks**, and other mods help you bring your steampunk world to life ---
### **Technical Requirements** - **Client**: 4GB RAM minimum (6–8GB recommended) - **Server**: 6GB RAM for up to 10 players (8–12GB recommended)
### **Bugs, Issues & Suggestions** Join us on Discord to report bugs or suggest mods/config tweaks! https://discord.gg/zT2FF4nuwR Issues are tracked and forwarded to mod developers when necessary.

**Credits for Mods from Curseforge:** - **Apotheosis** and **Apothic Attributes** from Shadows_of_Fire - [Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis) - [Apothic Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes)

- **Ars Elemental** from Alexth99 - [Ars Elemental](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-elemental)

- **Citadel** and **Rats** from sbom_xela - [Citadel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel) - [Rats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rats)

- **Create Recycle Everything** from nocubeyt - [Create Recycle Everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)

- **Sophisticated Backpacks** and **Sophisticated Core** from P3pp3rF1y - [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks) - [Sophisticated Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-core)

- **Too Many Glyphs** from derringercubed - [Too Many Glyphs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/too-many-glyphs)

- **NoMoWanderer** from TheJDill - [NoMoWanderer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nomowanderer)

- **FramedBlocks** from XFactHD - [FramedBlocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framedblocks)

- **Placebo** from Shadows_of_Fire - [Placebo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/placebo)
